name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources is a Canadian gold producer operating the Morelos Complex in the Guerrero Gold Belt of Mexico, approximately 180 kilometres southwest of Mexico City. The complex includes the producing Media Luna Underground, ELG Underground, and ELG Open Pit mines, along with a processing plant and related infrastructure on a 29,000-hectare property. Torex is Mexico's largest gold producer, targeting annual production of 420,000 to 470,000 gold equivalent ounces.
